title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
